bot0:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Dying to bow users in open fields (3/5 recent deaths) shows we need better evasion and disengagement. Increasing dodgeEagerness to 0.9 improves arrow avoidance; raising kiteRangeBias to 4 creates safer distance. Boosting targetThreatAversion to 100 makes us more reluctant to engage high-threat bow u

lessons: Bow users (Deadeye) kill us in open-field 1v1s — always use cover or high ground during bow-heavy rounds.
Sword users (Lancer, Archmage, Juggernaut, GhostProtocol, Fortress, Valkyrie) are our top targets — we killed 10 of them with 0 deaths in last 5 rounds when we engaged safely.
Lancer (spear) and Scorpion (grapple) consistently kill us in fast_zone and standard rounds — retreat immediately if they close to melee range.
Hazard_storm boosts our bow performance (5-0 record in round 21) — prioritize storm rounds and use terrain for sniping advantage.
Shield users (Fortress, GhostProtocol, Juggernaut) rarely kill us — ignore unless they initiate; focus fire on sword and bow threats first.
Bow mirror matches are losing (12 deaths vs 4 kills total) — avoid dueling any bow user in open terrain without cover or elevation.
bot0:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow remains our most effective weapon with 6 wins in 29 rounds and high kill efficiency against sword users.

bot1:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: We die frequently to spears and grapples despite high kills, indicating we're too passive and under-dodging. Posture is currently 'defensive' — switch to 'aggressive' to force clustering and exploit staff’s AoE when 3+ enemies are present. Increase dodgeEagerness from 0.15 to 0.3 to reliably evade g

lessons: Staff wins decisively when sword users cluster (rounds 27, 30) — wait for 3+ melee enemies before engaging.
Valkyrie (spear) and Scorpion (grapple) have killed us 15 times combined — retreat immediately on sight; staff cannot out-range or outmaneuver them.
Fortress and Juggernaut (shield) are weak targets — we’ve killed them 21 times across history; prioritize them when isolated, even with staff.
Grapple users (Scorpion, NeuralReaper) exploit solo play — avoid open areas alone; stick to groups or switch to shield if available.
Hazard_storm and fast_zone reduce staff effectiveness — avoid engaging in these modifiers unless surrounded by sword users.
Bow has 2 wins in 19 rounds and dies instantly to spears/grapples — do not use it unless enemy melee is fully eliminated.
bot1:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Shield has the highest survivability against spear, grapple, and sword users, and we’ve killed Fortress/Juggernaut 21 times with it despite low usage.

lessons: Shield has 0 wins in 10 consecutive rounds — it cannot close on sword/staff users; avoid using it outside chokepoints or when enemy bow/staff are suppressed.
Sword users killed us 8 times in last 10 rounds despite our shield — they overwhelm shield’s slow mobility; prioritize killing them first with spear or aggressive shield flanks.
Staff users (Archmage, Reaper, HexMind) killed us 6 times in last 10 rounds — retreat immediately in open areas; their range dominates shield and spear in mid-range.
NeuralReaper (bow) killed us in round 32 — bow is resurging in double_bounty and high-visibility rounds; avoid open ground when bow sightings spike.
In hazard_storm and fast_zone modifiers, we have 0 wins and 15 deaths — hold chokepoints, delay engagement, and never chase into shrinking zones.
We killed 12 sword users in last 10 rounds (highest target count) — they are our most vulnerable high-spawn enemy; spear remains optimal for closing on them.
bot2:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Spear has the best balance of range and mobility to close on sword users, who are our most frequent and vulnerable targets, and outperforms shield in all recent engagements.
